intro: The cryptocurrency sector faced a concentrated wave of high and critical severity threats in mid-April 2026, as detailed in sixteen ZCyberNews reports. The Lazarus Group, FakeWallet, and Omnistealer were the primary threat actors targeting cryptocurrency, decentralized finance (DeFi), and financial services. Their campaigns, impacting entities in the United States, Canada, and Europe, frequently exploited vulnerabilities including CVE-2023-4863. The software development and technology sectors were also notably affected by this global activity, which comprised thirteen high and three critical severity incidents.
